user.title: Connect to MaintainX
user.description: Enter your MaintainX API key. You can find this in MaintainX under Settings > API Keys.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your MaintainX API key and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to MaintainX API. Please check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This MaintainX account is already configured.

create_work_order.name: Create Work Order
create_work_order.description: Create a new work order (job) in MaintainX.

title.name: Title
title.description: The title of the work order.

description.name: Description
description.description: Detailed description of the work order.

priority.name: Priority
priority.description: Priority level (NONE, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL).

update_work_order.name: Update Work Order
update_work_order.description: Update an existing work order in MaintainX.

work_order_id.name: Work Order ID
work_order_id.description: The ID of the work order to update.

complete_work_order.name: Complete Work Order
complete_work_order.description: Mark a work order as done.

work_order_id.name: Work Order ID
work_order_id.description: The ID of the work order to complete.

add_comment.name: Add Comment
add_comment.description: Add a comment to a work order.

work_order_id.name: Work Order ID
work_order_id.description: The ID of the work order.
